# 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the change, the problem it solves, and the motivation behind it. Link any relevant issue tickets.

---

# 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Briefly describe the technical approach taken. Why was this implementation chosen over alternatives? Mention any architectural implications.

---

# 📏 PR Sizing Checklist

- [ ] This PR is **under 300 LOC** (excluding generated code).
- [ ] If this PR is **over 300 LOC**, I have scheduled a synchronous walkthrough with a reviewer.

---

# 🧪 Verification & Testing

### Automated Tests
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests covering these changes.
- [ ] Checked that all local tests pass (run `./puro/check.sh` locally).

### Manual Verification
Describe the manual steps you took to test these changes. Provide command lines and expected output where applicable.

---

# 📸 Visuals (if applicable)

Please attach screenshots, terminal outputs, or screen recordings demonstrating the changes.

---

# ✅ PR Readiness Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style rules of this project.
- [ ] I have run `dart format` to format the code.
- [ ] I have run `dart analyze` and fixed all warnings/errors.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own changes before opening this PR.
